nasb.text: For they have opened the wicked and deceitful mouth against me; They have spoken against me with a lying tongue.

esv.text: For wicked and deceitful mouths are opened against me, speaking against me with lying tongues.

cnv.text: 因為邪惡的人的嘴和詭詐的人的口，已經張開攻擊我； 他們用虛謊的舌頭對我說話。

ccb.text: 因为邪恶和诡诈的人开口攻击我， 用谎言毁谤我。

csbs.text: 因为邪恶的口和欺诈的口都向我张开， 用撒谎的舌头对我说话，
